sentence: 这个地区以农林业为主。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yǐ nóng lín yè wéi zhǔ.
english: This region's economy is mainly based on agriculture and forestry.

meaning: to regard as the foremost; to name as a prime example; to implement fo
sentence: 说到川菜，首推麻婆豆腐。
pinyin: Shuō dào Chuāncài, shǒu tuī mápó dòufu.
english: When it comes to Sichuan cuisine, mapo tofu is the top recommendation.

sentence: 你可以在讨论区发帖提问。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ zài tǎo lùn qū fā tiē tí wèn.
english: You can post questions in the forum discussion area.

sentence: 这根电线的端子坏了，需要换新的。
pinyin: Zhè gēn diànxiàn de duān zi huài le, xūyào huàn xīn de.
english: The terminal on this wire is broken and needs to be replaced.

meaning: to control flow; to choke; weir valve; a throttle; a choke
sentence: 公司今年决定开源节流，削减开支。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián juédìng kāiyuán jié liú, xuējiǎn kāizhī.
english: The company decided this year to increase income and cut costs to reduce spending.
